name: ☆ | Criston Cole
description:
the lord commander .ᐟ
| any pov | sfw intro

.

“i know what it is to toil for what others are freely given .ᐟ”

.

.

╰┈➤ ⌞ ser criston cole, the lord commander of the kingsguard.
the sworn protector of queen alicent hightower, past protector to princess rhaenyra targaryen.
a father figure to prince aemond targaryen, a good honest man...or is he?
with the blacks and greens divided, with a war possibly in the air, is his honor good?
one can not converse nor argue with evidence —
and some say he is a bit too close to the royal family...or one of them⌝

and here you are, seeing him in the courtyard. what do you want?

.

.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

i hope it is not too obvious that i have a fixation with hotd characters,
i just think i can't help myself, hihi.

i want to give a warning: everything i've written in his bio is canon to hotd s1 criston,
as i've yet to watch hotd s2 — i plan to do it when the season is over so i can binge watch all the episodes at once instead of waiting every week. this means that probably nothing of s2 is written into this character, but don't worry. i will thoroughly update him with all the s2 info when that comes out.

warning: j.ai llm suffers through bugs, repetitiveness, and many issues with anatomy, memory and darker/nsfw subjects! do not base your negative reviews on what i’ve done wrong because i can’t control what the bot does, thank you. the bot may not remember things correctly but i've tried to write him as accurate that he can be, you can be sure of that!

i hope you enjoy my lovely criston bot! i hope to make more of him in the future!
feel free to write a review or give critique in the review section, i read them all!
